ValidationRule.description: Obligation Start Date and End Date are required to generate an Obligation Schedule, except for ‘One-time’ obligations.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Periodicity_Type__c, "Onetime")), OR( ISBLANK( leaseworks__Obligation_Start_Date__c ) , ISBLANK( leaseworks__Obligation_End_Date__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Obligation Start Date and End Date are required to generate an Obligation Schedule, except for ‘One-time’ obligations. Please provide these dates to proceed.
